task_completion.description: Verify that the Home address is set to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, DC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sygic app's Favorites, Dashboard, or Commute settings, the 'Home' location displays '1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW', 'White House', or a map pin at this location.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Work address is set to 350 5th Avenue, New York, NY.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sygic app's Favorites, Dashboard, or Commute settings, the 'Work' location displays '350 5th Avenue', 'Empire State Building', or a map pin at this location.

task_completion.description: Verify that a gas station was located and selected in the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A gas station POI (Point of Interest) is selected on the map or its details page is open.

task_completion.description: Verify that the gas station is saved as a Favorite.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The gas station is added to the Favorites list, indicated by a filled heart icon, a star, or its presence in the saved places menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the saved gas station favorite is explicitly named 'Gas Station'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Favorites list or location details, the custom name for the saved place is exactly 'Gas Station' (not just the brand name like 'Shell' or 'Mobil').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sygic GPS Navigation app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sygic app interface, not a web browser, text editor, or generic maps app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to set locations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show search bars, on-screen keyboards, or map interactions rather than terminal windows or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent selected actual map locations rather than typing text into a dummy list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved locations are linked to actual map POIs or addresses within the navigation app's ecosystem.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Home address is 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, DC (White House), coordinates ~38.8977, -77.0365. Work address is 350 5th Avenue, New York, NY (Empire State Building), coordinates ~40.7484, -73.9857. A coordinate tolerance of 0.1 degrees (~11.1 km) is acceptable. The favorite location must be a gas station and explicitly named 'Gas Station'.
